productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Stripes Black Socks
description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into this pair of socks from Reid and Taylor. Crafted from soft, stretchable fabric, these socks have been designed for the confident executive. Made of a mercerised cotton-lycra blend knit fabric for all-day comfort, easy stretch and sweat-free wear Has black, purple and grey stripes Padded footbed for cushioned comfort Hand finished toe seam for abrasion-free wear Rib knit mouth for a comfortable wear Roomy toe area for superior comfort and durability sock care Machine wash cold in 40 degrees using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not iron, dry clean or tumble dry Dry in shade
